title: Limit customers to one subscription
excerpt: Direct customers to manage their subscription when they already have one. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/limit-subscriptions.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/limit-subscriptions.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
